title: Niku Naku Pellanta Tom Tom Tom
original_title: Niku Naku Pellanta Tom Tom Tom
overview: Niku Naku Pellanta Tom Tom Tom is a Telugu movie starring Sanjana  Anne, Karthik Shiva and Khuym in prominent roles. Ilt is a drama  directed by Manikanta Thalluri with Shatabdi Srinivas Reddy as  producer, forming part of the crew.
